summary: Full-stack CSE Roadmap Tracker application with React frontend (Vite, Tailwind, React Router, Recharts) and Spring Boot backend (JWT auth, MySQL, JPA). Features: authentication, dashboard with analytics, timeline/planner views, project tracker, mock test tracker, and progress tracking.
architectural_notes: Frontend: React + Vite, Tailwind CSS, React Router, Context API/Zustand, Axios, Recharts
Backend: Spring Boot, Spring Security, JWT auth, MySQL, JPA/Hibernate, Lombok
Folder structure: components/, pages/, context/, hooks/, services/, layouts/, routes/
Backend layered architecture: Controller, Service, Repository, DTO, Entity, Config, Security
JWT token storage on frontend with auto-redirect for unauthenticated users
Clean, modern professional UI (Notion/Linear style), responsive for mobile + desktop
Global error handling, validation annotations, DTO mapping, loading states, toast notifications
Include example dummy data and MySQL schema

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity authentication system with login, logout, and protected routes that auto-redirect unauthenticated users
Create Dashboard page with welcome message displaying user name, overview cards showing Total Tasks, Completed Tasks, Pending Tasks, and Current Streak, plus a progress bar
Add Recharts analytics to Dashboard with Weekly Progress Chart showing task completion over time and Completion Pie Chart displaying completed vs pending tasks
Build Timeline view with collapsible accordion structure organized by Month → Week → Day, allowing users to track daily progress and mark topics as complete
Implement Daily Planner with full CRUD operations: add, edit, delete tasks, mark as complete, set due dates, and assign priority levels (High, Medium, Low)
Create Project Tracker with ability to add projects, update status (Planning, In Progress, Completed), include GitHub links, and list tech stack for each project
Build Mock Test Tracker to add tests with name, score, and date, plus display improvement graph showing score trends over time
Create Progress Tracking page displaying overall completion percentage, comprehensive graphs, and weekly performance trend analytics
Structure frontend with proper folder organization: components, pages, context, hooks, services, layouts, and routes directories with clean reusable components
Implement comprehensive error handling with proper error states, loading states, and toast notifications for user feedback
Ensure full responsive design for both mobile and desktop viewports with clean, modern, professional UI inspired by Notion and Linear aesthetics

new_feature_requests.summary: Authentication system with login, register, logout, JWT storage, and protected routes
Dashboard with overview cards (total/completed/pending tasks, streak), progress bar, and Recharts analytics (weekly progress, completion pie chart)
Timeline view with collapsible month/week/day structure to track daily progress and mark topics complete
Daily Planner with CRUD operations for tasks, completion marking, due dates, and priority levels
Project Tracker with add/update/delete, status tracking (Planning/In Progress/Completed), GitHub links, and tech stack
Mock Test Tracker with test name, score, date tracking, and improvement graphs
Progress Tracking page with overall completion %, graphs, and weekly performance trends
Spring Boot backend with JWT authentication, MySQL, JPA/Hibernate, layered architecture (Controller/Service/Repository/DTO/Entity)
Backend User Module with get/update profile APIs
Backend Task Module with CRUD operations and task completion by user
Implement backend User Profile module with get profile and update profile endpoints
Create backend Task module with endpoints to create, update, delete tasks, mark complete, and get all tasks filtered by authenticated user
Implement backend Project module with endpoints to add, update status, delete projects, and get all projects for authenticated user
Create backend Mock Test module with endpoints to add tests, update scores, get all tests, and provide performance analytics data
Implement backend Analytics API with endpoints returning total tasks, completed tasks, weekly progress data, and overall completion percentage
Include example dummy data for tasks, projects, mock tests, and timeline entries to demonstrate full functionality
